reason: Successfully navigated to the application, located and clicked the specified agent, verified its status, sent a math question, and confirmed the response contained the expected answer "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Clicked agent "QA-20260615-014753-wclw" in the sidebar — Agent page loaded successfully
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator in top right shows "idle" which meets requirement (running or idle)
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully typed and sent using home-send-button
Waited for response — Agent responded within 1 second (well under 3 minute limit)
Verified response mentions "4" — Response clearly displays "4" in the chat, along with "Worked for 1s" metric. A new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created automatically.
